templates.text: Messy notes are not the problem. The handoff is. SPEC AI turns rough notes into summary, tasks, and share-ready text. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.

A useful meeting note should become three things: summary, tasks, and share text. SPEC AI is built for that small workflow. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
Tiny workflow: paste rough notes, get summary, tasks, and share-ready text. That is the SPEC AI job. Free: 1 successful analysis/day. Pro: 10 successful analyses/day for ¥300/month.
